labels.label:
GenrateTableFetch is used to generate the SQL query to fetch the data, you can define the partition size 
if you want to fetch the data in group like (10 records a time).
-> You can also specify where clause property.
-> It fetches the data in incremental order i.e if once 10 records get 
fetched, it will fetch next 10 records next time when available (for this we need to define maximum-value column).
-> You can define the partition size or the columns that will be used for partitioning (default uses row number)
